zh.lifeSummary: 當Finola Maclean of Duart於大約1430年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾德華爾特 卡素時，她的父親Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean37歲，母親Janetta Stewart Lady Duart29歲。她於1448年與Celestine MacDonald 1st of Lochalsh在英國蘇格蘭羅斯 安德 可洛馬迪丁瓦爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1515年在蘇格蘭可洛馬迪夏爾可洛馬迪享年86歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Finola Maclean of Duart于大约1430年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾德華爾特 卡素时，她的父亲Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean37岁，母亲Janetta Stewart Lady Duart29岁。她于1448年与Celestine MacDonald 1st of Lochalsh在英国苏格兰羅斯 安德 可洛馬迪丁瓦爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1515年在苏格兰可洛馬迪夏爾可洛馬迪享年86岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Maclean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McLean
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gille Eáin, ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) John’. Compare Irish McAloon and McGlone .

History: This is the name of a major Scottish clan traditionally associated with the island of Mull, which claims descent from Gille Eáin na Tuaidh (‘Gillean of the Battleaxe’), who lived in the 13th century.

nameMeanings.name: Finola
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Fionnuala
meanings: Modern Gaelic form of the traditional name Fionnguala, from fionn ‘white, fair’ + guala ‘shoulder’.

en.lifeSummary: When Finola Maclean of Duart was born about 1430, in Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland, her father, Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean, was 37 and her mother, Janetta Stewart Lady Duart, was 29. She married Celestine MacDonald 1st of Lochalsh in 1448, in Dingwall, Ross and Cromarty, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1515, in Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland, at the age of 86, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Finola Maclean of Duart est née environ 1430, à Duart Castle, Argyll, Écosse, son père, Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Janetta Stewart Lady Duart, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Celestine MacDonald 1st of Lochalsh en 1448, à Dingwall, Ross and Cromarty, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1515, à Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Finola Maclean of Duart um 1430 in Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean 37 und ihre Mutter Janetta Stewart Lady Duart 29. Sie hat 1448 in Dingwall, Ross and Cromarty, Schottland, United Kingdom Celestine MacDonald 1st of Lochalsh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1515 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Finola Maclean of Duart è nata il circa 1430 nel Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland, sua padre, Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Janetta Stewart Lady Duart, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Celestine MacDonald 1st of Lochalsh nel 1448, nel Dingwall, Ross and Cromarty, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1515, nel Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland, all'età di 86 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Finola Maclean of Duartが約1430年にスコットランドアルグイルダアルト カストルで生まれた時，父Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLeanは37歳，母Janetta Stewart Lady Duartは29歳であった。1448年にイギリススコットランドロス アンド クロマルトイディングワルでCelestine MacDonald 1st of Lochalshと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1515年にスコットランドクロマルトイシュアイアクロマルトイで86歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.Duart Castle, Isle of Mull, Argyll, Scot: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 단아르트 카스틀

ko.lifeSummary: Finola Maclean of Duart(이)가 대략 1430년 스컷랜드 아그이 단아르트 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Janetta Stewart Lady Duart(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1448년 영국 스코틀랜드 로스 앤드 크로마티 딩월에서 Celestine MacDonald 1st of Lochalsh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1515년 스컷랜드 크로마티실르 크로마티에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Finola Maclean of Duart nasceu aproximadamente 1430, em Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Janetta Stewart Lady Duart, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Celestine MacDonald 1st of Lochalsh em 1448, em Dingwall, Ross and Cromarty, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1515, em Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland, com 86 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.Tulloch Castle, Dingwall, Ross & Cromart: дингвалл, росс анд кромерти, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Finola Maclean of Duart родилась около 1430 г. в местности дуарт кастл, аргилл, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Janetta Stewart Lady Duart, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Celestine MacDonald 1st of Lochalsh в 1448 г. в местности дингвалл, росс анд кромерти, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1515 г. в местности кромерти, кромертишир, Шотландия в возрасте 86 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Finola Maclean of Duart nació aproximadamente 1430, en Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland, su papá, Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Janetta Stewart Lady Duart, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Celestine MacDonald 1st of Lochalsh en 1448, en Dingwall, Ross and Cromarty, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1515, en Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
